option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
add_library(${ENGINE_TARGET} STATIC) target_compile_features(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC cxx_std_20) target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC logiface::logiface)
target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE FileLoader ${BACKEND_TARGET} )
find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED) find_package(Ktx CONFIG REQUIRED) find_package(glm CONFIG REQUIRED) find_package(fastgltf CONFIG REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE Vulkan::Vulkan KTX::ktx glm::glm fastgltf::fastgltf )
target_include_directories(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src )
target_compile_options(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:GNU>:-Wall -Werror> $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:Clang>:-Wall -Werror> $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:MSVC>:/W4 /WX> )
if(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES) target_compile_options(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE "$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-g>" "$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-O0>" "$<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O3>" ) endif()
target_sources(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE Input/Input.cpp Mesh/MeshAssembler.cpp ResourceSystem/ResourceSystem.cpp ResourceSystem/TextureResource.cpp )
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang") target_sources(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES Input/Input.cppm Mesh/MeshTypes.cppm Mesh/MeshAssembler.cppm ResourceSystem/ResourceSystem.cppm ResourceSystem/TextureResource.cppm Application/Application.cppm Startup/Startup.cppm Components/Transform.cppm Components/MeshRenderer.cppm FileLoaders/Mesh/BinMeshAssembler.cppm FileLoaders/Mesh/GltfMeshAssembler.cppm ) endif()
if(COMMAND enable_target_clang_tidy) enable_target_clang_tidy(${ENGINE_TARGET}) endif()

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
add_library(${ENGINE_TARGET} STATIC) target_compile_features(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC cxx_std_20) target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC logiface::logiface)
target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE FileLoader ${BACKEND_TARGET} )
find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED) find_package(Ktx CONFIG REQUIRED) find_package(glm CONFIG REQUIRED) find_package(fastgltf CONFIG REQUIRED) find_package(Stb REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE Vulkan::Vulkan KTX::ktx glm::glm fastgltf::fastgltf )
target_include_directories(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC ${Stb_INCLUDE_DIR} )
target_include_directories(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src )
target_compile_options(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:GNU>:-Wall -Werror> $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:Clang>:-Wall -Werror> $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:MSVC>:/W4 /WX> )
if(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES) target_compile_options(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE "$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-g>" "$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-O0>" "$<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O3>" ) endif()
target_sources(${ENGINE_TARGET} PRIVATE Input/Input.cpp FileLoaders/Textures/TextureLoaders.cpp Mesh/MeshAssembler.cpp ResourceSystem/ResourceSystem.cpp ResourceSystem/TextureResource.cpp )
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang") target_sources(${ENGINE_TARGET} PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES Input/Input.cppm Mesh/MeshTypes.cppm Mesh/MeshAssembler.cppm ResourceSystem/ResourceSystem.cppm ResourceSystem/TextureResource.cppm Application/Application.cppm Startup/Startup.cppm Components/Transform.cppm Components/MeshRenderer.cppm FileLoaders/Mesh/BinMeshAssembler.cppm FileLoaders/Mesh/GltfMeshAssembler.cppm ) endif()
if(COMMAND enable_target_clang_tidy) enable_target_clang_tidy(${ENGINE_TARGET}) endif()

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
